items.title: Rubio warns Europe of new era in geopolitics before big Munich speech
items.description: The US Secretary of State will address the first major transatlantic meeting since Donald Trump threatened to annex Greenland.

items.title: Leak damages 19th Century painting in latest Louvre setback
items.description: A catalogue of incidents at the world's most visited museum have placed museum bosses come under increasing scrutiny.

items.title: Bangladesh Nationalist Party sweeps to victory in first election since Gen Z uprising
items.description: Voters are hoping for a return to democracy after 15 years of authoritarian rule under Sheikh Hasina.

items.title: Watch SpaceX rocket blast off to International Space Station
items.description: Watch moment Falcon 9 rocket blasts off to International Space Station

items.title: Watch: How Andrew's BBC interview compares to what Epstein emails tell us now
items.description: Following the latest release of the Epstein files, claims made by the then Prince Andrew in 2019 are under fresh scrutiny.
